title: IntergalactiCraft : The Sky And Beyond
description: IntergalactiCraft: The Sky and Beyond brings space exploration, over a million new items, slabs, tools, advanced mechanics, revamped terrain, villages, and structures—an expansive overhaul that transforms the game into an endless adventure.
body:
IntergalactiCraft: The Sky and Beyond is a feature-rich vanilla+ mod that massively expands on the base game while preserving its core identity. Explore new dimensions—including space—with fully explorable planets, orbital structures, and alien landscapes. On Earth, discover enhanced terrain generation, new biomes, unique structures, and reimagined villages full of life and personality.

With over 1000 new items, including custom slabs, tools, weapons, and decorative blocks, building and crafting take on new depth. The mod also adds refined survival mechanics, advanced farming and automation systems, and subtle quality-of-life improvements that feel right at home in a vanilla setting.

Whether you're aiming for the stars or simply expanding your home base with fresh tools and blocks, The Sky and Beyond brings boundless content for players who want more—without losing the essence of what makes Minecraft so fun.
